We truly value those connections and do our best to focus on these bonds that tie us together as nenqayni (people of the land). ## 100 Mile House chapter of Healthcare Infusion established Published 5:00 am Saturday, July 11, 2026 **By Patrick Davies** The founding members of the 100 Mile House Healthcare Infusion group. (100 Mile House Healthcare Infusion photo) (100 Mile House Healthcare Infusion) Canada’s Healthcare Infusion movement now has a chapter in 100 Mile House. This week, 100 Mile House Healthcare Infusion announced that it has officially formed and is seeking a letter of support from the District of 100 Mile House. They stated their goal is to help attract international healthcare workers to the South
